Subject: RE: OLP-5R Pole Height Limits – Harborview Promenade

Daniel,

Following up on Friday’s coordination call, I ran the wind and base reaction checks for the Selux OLP-5R poles at the various mounting heights you’re considering.

Structurally, the catalog configuration you sent over is fine at **20FT** with the Olivio Grande multi-head arrangement, even with the BP/TA/BSE accessories, as long as the base plates follow the standard template and we maintain the 4-bolt pattern with proper embedment. That said, from a streetscape scale perspective, I agree with your instinct that 20FT starts to feel a bit over-scaled for a pedestrian promenade.

Once you settle on 14FT as your baseline (with 10FT at the special conditions), send me the final schedule so I can update my calculation package and sign/seal the structural sheets.

Best,
Mark
PNW Structural Consultants
